Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM (L3 Measurement based Triggered Mobility).
Feature_Objectives: To enable mobility of a UE between different gNB-DUs under the same gNB-CU using LTM procedures.
To facilitate the setup of UE context and data bearers in a candidate gNB-DU for LTM.
To allow the gNB-CU to configure CSI resources and LTM-specific information in candidate gNB-DUs.

Protocol_Interfaces: F1-C (Control Plane between gNB-CU and gNB-DU)

Call_Flow.Description: Added by Self Learning agent from mapping rules
Added by Self Learning agent from mapping rules

Procedure_Implementation_Steps: 1. The UE sends a MeasurementReport message (L3 measurement result) to the source gNB-DU containing measurements of neighbouring cells. The source gNB-DU sends an UL RRC MESSAGE TRANSFER message conveying the received MeasurementReport message to the gNB-CU.
2. The gNB-CU determines to initiate LTM configuration.

3. The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

4. If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.

Code_Instructions.description: Data structure defining the format of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message, used by gNB-CU to send to gNB-DU.
Data structure defining the format of the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message, used by gNB-DU to respond to gNB-CU.
Helper function responsible for generating the RRC-level information and populating the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message structure before encoding and sending.
Function likely involved in the construction or encoding of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message, translating RRC/MAC parameters into the F1AP message format.
Generic utility function to copy byte arrays, useful for populating various information elements (IEs) within F1AP messages.
Memory allocation utility function that allocates and zeroes memory, failing if allocation is unsuccessful. Essential for creating and initializing F1AP message structures.
Utility function for the gNB-CU to retrieve specific UE context data relevant for F1AP procedures, which would be needed to populate the UE Context Setup Request.
Utility function to obtain a unique transaction identifier for F1AP messages, ensuring proper correlation of requests and responses.
Generic utility function to access an element at a specific index within a sequential array data structure, potentially used for managing lists of IEs or UE contexts.
